description: Duplicate the existing quote 'Office Network Upgrade - Phase 1' for the account 'Pinnacle Distribution Co' to create a new quote. On the new quote, set the Subject to 'Office Network Upgrade - Phase 2', the Stage to 'Draft', and the Valid Until date to '04/15/2026'. Update the quantity of the 'Cisco ISR 4331 Integrated Services Router' to 8 while keeping the 'Cisco Catalyst 9300 48-port PoE+ Switch' quantity at 10. The original quote must remain untouched.

metadata.expected_term_conditions: LEGAL DISCLAIMER: This quote is subject to the Master Services Agreement v4.2 signed on 01/15/2023. Any hardware returns are subject to a 15% restocking fee. Valid only for Pinnacle Distribution Co.
